name: Rum Raisin Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine oats, nuts, brown sugar and margarine; press onto bottom of 9-inch springform pan. Bake at 350 degrees F., for 15 minutes.
2. In a large bowl, combine cream cheese, granulated sugar, and flour. Mix until well blended.
3. Add eggs one at a time, mixing well after each addition.
4. Blend in sour cream and rum; mix well.
5. Pour the mixture over the crust.
6. Cut margarine into remaining flour and brown sugar until the mixture resembles coarse crumbs. Stir in raisins, nuts and oats.
7. Sprinkle over the cream cheese mixture.
8. Bake at 350 degrees F., for 50 minutes. Loosen cake from rim of pan; cool before removing rim of pan.
